title: Croatian Quick Fix Soup
description: A hearty and comforting soup made with Croatian ingredients, perfect for a quick and easy meal.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the diced quick and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the Croatian fix and cook for 1 minute.
Pour in the bisque and bring to a simmer.
Add the x and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and let simmer for 10 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
